description: Mission restricts common objectives to king-is-dead + trophies-of-war and has no secondary objectives at all, so baggage/domination/strategic-locations must NOT contribute even though manualObjectiveState/strategicLocationVpTotal below are non-zero. Killing the general still auto-detects king-is-dead. Two of the dead units carry Battle Standard / Standard command roles, but standards captured are no longer inferred from a unit's death — only the manual standardsCaptured tally (set to 2 here) should feed trophies-of-war VP.
